sourceDebug.sampleAroundTeamList: NRL 2026, Round 21, Late Mail, injuries, team updates, late changes, team lists | NRL.com Skip to main content Main News Watch Travel Draw Ladder Players Stats Fantasy Tipping More About Us Accommodation Careers Child Safety Clubs Community Competitions Hall of Fame Integrity Indigenous Judiciary and Match Review Media Releases Memorabilia NRL Pacific Operations Play Rugby League Watch Overseas Wellbeing and Education Membership Tickets Hospitality Shop Search Log In You have skipped the navigation, tab for page content Team Lists Presented By NRL Late Mail: Round 21 - Dearden ruled out; Knights lose Ponga Author NRL.com Timestamp Fri 24 Jul 2026, 04:34 PM Share on social media Share via Facebook Share via Twitter Share via Whats-app Share via Reddit Share via Email The Cowboys have been dealt a blow on the eve of the Queensland derby with Tom Dearden ruled out with a leg injury. The halfback only made his return from a serious ankle injury last weekend, but he has picked up another ankle injury, this time to the other leg. While the Cowboys are yet to confirm Dearden's replacement, it's likely centre Jaxon Purdue will shift back to the halves. Liam Sutton is also in the reserves and could come into the side if Todd Payten opts for a like-for-like replacement. Knights superstar Kalyn Ponga is out of Friday's clash against the Roosters due to quad tightness. The reshuffle sees Fletcher Sharpe move to fullback and Sandon Smith join the starting side at five-eighth. The loss of David Fifita to suspension and Cameron Murray and Tallis Duncan to injury has forced the Rabbitohs into a major reshuffle ahead of their crucial clash with the Storm. Go
